title: Functional Suitability
description:
Refers to the system's ability to provide functions that correctly meet user needs. Suitable software solves the proposed problem with completeness and accuracy.
[ul]
[b]Functional completeness[/b]: covers all expected tasks and objectives.
[b]Functional correctness[/b]: produces correct results.
[b]Functional appropriateness[/b]: facilitates task execution.[/ul]
